text.title: Role Cheatsheet Generator Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping role-tag coverage + tier policy to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf is a conclusion ref bound to a rule id.

conclusion.verdict: filter by tier-manifest; rank top-10; merge overrides

example.trace: coverage_low=false → role_thin=false → curated_exists=false → r2-tier-gated → emit cheatsheet at org tier with deterministic ordering

text.example: Canonical traversal from root question through branches to a single conclusion.
